steps: Dissolve oligo's in Oligo annealing buffer (40mM Tris-HCl (pH 8), 50mM NaCl) to a stock of 100 micromolar (µM) . Work in 96-well plates for easy pipetting.
Mix oligo's equimolar for each barcode: %s %s
Dilute to 62,5 ng/µL for 50 µL reactions Dilute to 25 ng/µL for 15 µL tagmentation reactions (like 10x Genomics ATAC)
5min 95°C, ramp (-1°C/s) to 65°C, 5min 65°C, ramp (-1°C/s) to 4°C. %s %s Adapters are now 50 micromolar (µM) .
Incubate for 00:45:00 @ 23 °C on a heater/shaker (300 RPM).
creator: Koen Theunis
